overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) Patient Management and Doctor Portal App for clinics and individual practitioners. It features 4-role authentication, prescription & EMR module, patient dashboard with 9 tabs, vitals/investigation tracking with trend graphs, appointment scheduling, serial display screen, and a public landing page with doctor profiles and emergency consultation.
features: Prescription & EMR with clinical summary auto-population
Patient dashboard with 9 colored sidebar tabs
Individual vitals and investigation trend graphs with bold units
Bilingual Bengali/English drug instructions and advice
Waiting room serial display screen with text-to-speech
Public landing page with doctor profiles and emergency consultation
PWA with offline support and mobile installation
